best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - valid user details: name="john doe", email="johndoe@example.com", password="password123" - invalid user details: name="", email="invalidemail", password="short" test steps: 1. start the application. 2. navigate to the user creation page. 3. enter valid user details and submit. 4. verify that the user is successfully created and redirected to the home page. 5. enter invalid user details and submit. 6. verify that an error message is displayed and the user is not created. expected result: - valid user creation should succeed and redirect to the home page. - invalid user creation should fail and display appropriate error messages.
